---
title: "Rapport indicateurs RATB ORCHIDEE"
lang: fr
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
    css: assets/orchidee-theme.css
    include-after-body: assets/quarto-toc-fix.html
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-location: right
    toc-expand: 4
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 280px
      body-width: 1450px
      margin-width: 280px
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 90
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

<!-- Operator-only setup section kept in source, not rendered. -->

```{r}
#| label: setup_source_bootstrap
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

source(file.path("R", "setup.R"))
```

```{r}
#| label: setup_chunk_options
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# Chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE, # Should blocks with program code be shown in knitted documents?
  eval = TRUE, # Should program code be evaluated?
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.height = 8, # Default height for plots.
  fig.width = 14, # Default width for plots.
  out.width = "100%", # Fill available body width.
  fig.align = "center" # Default alignment for plots in knitted documents.
)

options(
  scipen = 8,
  digits = getOption("digits"),
  OutDec = ".",
  knitr.kable.NA = ""
)

```

<!-- Report display helpers are sourced from R/ratb_report_helpers.R. -->


<!-- Operator-only script sourcing section. -->

```{r}
#| label: source_project_scripts
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

orchidee_source_required_script(
  "normalisation_bact.R",
  "normalisation_bact script"
)
orchidee_source_required_script(
  "normalisation_atb.R",
  "normalisation_atb script"
)
orchidee_source_required_script(
  "spares_shared_primitives.R",
  "spares_shared_primitives script"
)
orchidee_source_required_script(
  "spares_dedup.R",
  "spares_dedup script"
)
orchidee_source_required_script(
  "completion_helpers.R",
  "completion_helpers script"
)
orchidee_source_required_script(
  "completion_workflow_helpers.R",
  "completion_workflow_helpers script"
)
orchidee_source_required_script(
  "ratb_indicator_helpers.R",
  "ratb_indicator_helpers script"
)
orchidee_source_required_script(
  "ratb_hospital_days_helpers.R",
  "ratb_hospital_days_helpers script"
)
orchidee_source_required_script(
  "ratb_canonical_runtime_helpers.R",
  "ratb_canonical_runtime_helpers script"
)
orchidee_source_required_script(
  "chu_ratb_scope_cache_helpers.R",
  "CHU native RATB scope cache helpers"
)
orchidee_source_required_script(
  "ratb_report_helpers.R",
  "ratb_report_helpers script"
)
```


```{r}
#| label: initialize_ratb_report_helpers
#| include: false
#| echo: false
initialize_ratb_report_helpers(
  download_dir = orchidee_config$paths$downloads_dir,
  datatable_digits = orchidee_config$report$datatable_digits,
  datatable_filter_default = orchidee_config$report$datatable_filter_default,
  datatable_initial_zoom = orchidee_config$report$datatable_initial_zoom,
  datatable_zoom_step = orchidee_config$report$datatable_zoom_step
)
```

<!-- Operator-only artifact loading section kept in source, not rendered. -->


```{r}
#| label: load_sir_wide_artifact
#| include: false
#| echo: false

orchidee_source_required_script("helpers.R", "helpers script")

data_dir <- orchidee_config$paths$data_dir
dictionaries_dir <- orchidee_config$paths$dictionaries_dir

sir_wide_artifact_path <- file.path(data_dir, "sir_wide.rds")
sir_wide_meta_path <- file.path(data_dir, "sir_wide_meta.rds")
required_artifacts <- c(sir_wide_artifact_path, sir_wide_meta_path)

if (!all(file.exists(required_artifacts))) {
  missing <- required_artifacts[!file.exists(required_artifacts)]
  stop(
    "Missing sir_wide artifact files: ",
    paste(missing, collapse = ", "),
    "\n",
    "Run: Rscript R/build_sir_wide_artifact.R\n",
    "Then rerun: quarto render orchidee_dedup_workflow.qmd",
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

sir_wide_meta <- readRDS(sir_wide_meta_path)
sir_wide <- readRDS(sir_wide_artifact_path)

artifact_validation <- validate_loaded_sir_wide_artifact(
  sir_wide = sir_wide,
  meta = sir_wide_meta
)

if (!isTRUE(artifact_validation$ok)) {
  stop(
    "sir_wide artifact is invalid or inconsistent with metadata:\n - ",
    paste(artifact_validation$reasons, collapse = "\n - "),
    "\nRun: Rscript R/build_sir_wide_artifact.R",
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

if (!exists("filtre_atb") && !is.null(sir_wide_meta$filtre_atb)) {
  filtre_atb <- sir_wide_meta$filtre_atb
}
```

<!-- Operator-only cache-loading section kept in source, not rendered. -->

```{r}
#| label: indicators_cached_scope_and_dedup_artifacts
#| include: false
#| echo: false

dedup_cache_candidates <- list(
  list(
    results = file.path(data_dir, "dedup_results"),
    meta = file.path(data_dir, "dedup_cache_meta")
  )
)

ratb_scope_cache_candidates <- list(
  list(
    payload = file.path(data_dir, "ratb_scope_cache"),
    meta = file.path(data_dir, "ratb_scope_cache_meta")
  )
)

dedup_cache_source <- NA_character_
dedup_results <- NULL
dedup_cache_meta <- NULL

for (candidate in dedup_cache_candidates) {
  cache_paths <- unlist(candidate, use.names = FALSE)
  if (!all(file.exists(cache_paths))) {
    next
  }

  loaded_results <- tryCatch(readRDS(candidate$results), error = function(e) {
    NULL
  })
  loaded_meta <- tryCatch(readRDS(candidate$meta), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.list(loaded_results) || !is.list(loaded_meta)) {
    next
  }

  dedup_results <- loaded_results
  dedup_cache_meta <- loaded_meta
  dedup_cache_source <- candidate$results
  break
}

ratb_scope_cache_source <- NA_character_
ratb_scope_cache_payload <- NULL
ratb_scope_cache_meta <- NULL

for (candidate in ratb_scope_cache_candidates) {
  cache_paths <- unlist(candidate, use.names = FALSE)
  if (!all(file.exists(cache_paths))) {
    next
  }

  loaded_payload <- tryCatch(readRDS(candidate$payload), error = function(e) {
    NULL
  })
  loaded_meta <- tryCatch(readRDS(candidate$meta), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.list(loaded_payload) || !is.list(loaded_meta)) {
    next
  }

  ratb_scope_cache_payload <- loaded_payload
  ratb_scope_cache_meta <- loaded_meta
  ratb_scope_cache_source <- candidate$payload
  break
}

if (is.null(dedup_results) || is.null(dedup_cache_meta)) {
  stop(
    "Missing dedup cache artifacts. Render orchidee_dedup_workflow.qmd first.",
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

if (is.null(ratb_scope_cache_payload) || is.null(ratb_scope_cache_meta)) {
  stop(
    "Missing RATB scope cache artifacts. Render orchidee_dedup_workflow.qmd first.",
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

stopifnot(
  exists("build_chu_ratb_runtime_payload_from_cache_payload", mode = "function"),
  exists("validate_ratb_canonical_runtime_inputs", mode = "function")
)

ratb_scope_cache_payload <- build_chu_ratb_runtime_payload_from_cache_payload(
  payload = ratb_scope_cache_payload,
  sir_wide = sir_wide
)
invisible(list2env(ratb_scope_cache_payload, envir = environment()))

ratb_runtime_validation <- validate_ratb_canonical_runtime_inputs(
  runtime_inputs = ratb_scope_cache_payload,
  sir_wide = sir_wide
)
if (!isTRUE(ratb_runtime_validation$ok)) {
  stop(
    "Canonical RATB runtime inputs are invalid:\n - ",
    paste(ratb_runtime_validation$errors, collapse = "\n - "),
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

stopifnot(
  is.list(dedup_results),
  length(dedup_results) > 0L,
  all(vapply(
    dedup_results,
    function(x) is.list(x) && all(c("global", "by_type") %in% names(x)),
    logical(1)
  )),
  exists("sir_wide_ratb_scope"),
  exists("ratb_episode_scope_audit"),
  exists("incidence_denominator_by_year")
)

```

# Rapport indicateurs RATB

Ce document présente la version annuelle actuellement livrée des indicateurs
RATB issus de `Expression_besoins_RATB_2-10-25.docx`. Il restitue les résultats
publiés du noyau actuellement disponible et ne reprend pas les audits détaillés
de qualité, de périmètre ou de validation, qui restent documentés dans
`orchidee_dedup_workflow.qmd`.
La méthode détaillée, les conventions ORCHIDEE et les choix d'implémentation
sont décrits dans
[`documentation/ratb_implementation_decisions.html`](documentation/ratb_implementation_decisions.html).

## Comment lire ce rapport

1. Commencer par le catalogue des indicateurs publiés pour voir quelles sorties sont actuellement livrées et selon quelle logique de lecture.
2. Lire ensuite les sections taxonomiques dans l'ordre du document d'expression de besoins.
3. Pour chaque taxon, commencer par les proportions globales de résistance.
4. Lire ensuite la densité d'incidence globale.
5. Terminer par les sorties par type, limitées ici à `hemoculture` et `urines`.
6. Les indicateurs phénotypiques publiés couvrent désormais la grille canonique `2 taxons × 2 phénotypes × 2 métriques` pour `K. pneumoniae` et `Enterobacterales` ; une sortie additionnelle de compatibilité reste publiée pour respecter la demande actuelle : `K. pneumoniae` carbapénémase en proportion sur `hemoculture`.
7. Ce rapport correspond à la livraison annuelle actuelle ; il ne couvre pas encore la déclinaison trimestrielle ni les autres stratifications demandées dans l'expression de besoins.
8. Pour la méthode détaillée et les validations, se reporter au mémo d'implémentation et au notebook interne de validation.
9. Les cartes thermiques utilisent une transformation de couleur réglée par `ratb_fill_transform` ; avec `"sqrt"`, les faibles écarts deviennent plus visibles (et le gros écarts moins visibles).
10. Les cartes thermiques de densité d'incidence partagent une borne supérieure commune, réglée par `ratb_incidence_fill_limit_mode`, afin de rendre les taxons comparables entre eux. La borne supérieure actuelle est provisoire.

## Périmètre de livraison

- le même périmètre analytique hospitalisation éligible alimente la complétion, la déduplication, les proportions annuelles de résistance, la densité d'incidence et les nuits d'hospitalisation éligibles
- la densité d'incidence annuelle est publiée en vue globale uniquement ; elle se distingue des proportions par sa métrique finale, avec un dénominateur en nuits d'hospitalisation éligibles
- le même catalogue biologique pilote les deux familles de métriques, avec des contrôles explicites de publication pour respecter la matrice demandée ; les familles actuellement normées sont `Fluoroquinolones = ofloxacine + levofloxacine + moxifloxacine + ciprofloxacine`, `C3G = cefotaxime + ceftazidime + ceftriaxone` et `Carbapénèmes = ertapénème + imipénème + méropénème`
- les vues par type restent limitées à `hemoculture` et `urines`
- les sorties phénotypiques publiées couvrent huit sorties canoniques (`K. pneumoniae` et `Enterobacterales`, BLSE et carbapénémase, en proportion globale et en incidence globale), auxquelles s'ajoute une sortie additionnelle de compatibilité : `K. pneumoniae` carbapénémase en proportion sur `hemoculture`
- pour les indicateurs phénotypiques, une souche n'est comptée positive que si son statut phénotypique final est positif ; les statuts non positifs alimentent le flag binaire `FALSE`
- les journées d'hospitalisation sont comptées en nuits selon une convention d'implémentation retenue faute de précision explicite dans l'expression de besoins, en cohérence avec une logique DIM
- la déclinaison trimestrielle et les autres stratifications demandées (âge, sexe, infection, site de prélèvement, service, établissement, etc.) **ne sont pas encore** publiées dans ce rapport
- le catalogue de référence est `documentation/ratb_indicator_spec.csv`

## Jeux comparés

Les jeux comparés dans les tableaux et les cartes thermiques sont affichés sous des
libellés courts :

- `brut` : données sans complétion additionnelle ;
- `compl. date` : complétion à la date de prélèvement au sein du séjour ;
- `compl. séjour` : complétion au niveau du séjour ;
- `compl. patient 30 j` : complétion au niveau du patient sur 30 jours ;
- `compl. patient année` : complétion au niveau du patient sur l'année civile.

Ces cinq jeux ne correspondent pas à cinq produits concurrents. Ils sont comparés en amont
pour évaluer si la complétion modifie suffisamment les sorties dédupliquées pour justifier
son maintien. La complétion doit donc être lue ici comme une analyse exploratoire, et non
comme une exigence explicite de l'expression de besoins ni comme une logique SPARES stricte.
```{r}
#| label: ratb_indicator_controls_to_tweak
#| #| echo: false
ratb_indicator_datasets <- names(dedup_results)
ratb_indicator_spec_path <- orchidee_config$paths$ratb_indicator_spec_path
ratb_indicator_sample_types <- orchidee_config$ratb$indicator_sample_types
ratb_indicator_show_full_spec <- orchidee_config$ratb$indicator_show_full_spec
ratb_indicator_min_n <- orchidee_config$ratb$indicator_min_n
recompute_incidence_pipeline <- orchidee_config$cache$recompute_incidence_pipeline
ratb_incidence_excluded_years <- orchidee_config$ratb$incidence_excluded_years

ratb_dataset_display_map <- c(
  sir_wide_raw = "brut",
  completion_date = "compl. date",
  completion_evtid = "compl. séjour",
  completion_patid_30d = "compl. patient 30 j",
  completion_patid_year = "compl. patient année"
)

ratb_indicator_axis_text_x_size <- 9
ratb_indicator_axis_text_y_size <- 9
ratb_indicator_strip_text_size <- 10
ratb_indicator_label_size_global <- 2.7
ratb_indicator_label_size_by_type <- 2.7
ratb_indicator_label_size_incidence <- 2.6

ratb_fill_transform <- "sqrt"
ratb_fill_breaks_proportion <- c(0, 5, 10, 25, 50, 75, 100)
ratb_fill_palette_proportion <- c("#1A9850", "#FEE08B", "#D73027")
ratb_fill_palette_incidence <- c("#F7FBFF", "#9ECAE1", "#3182BD", "#08519C")
ratb_fill_breaks_incidence <- NULL
ratb_incidence_fill_limit_mode <- "quantile"
ratb_incidence_fill_limit_quantile <- 0.975
ratb_incidence_fill_limit_manual <- NA_real_

ratb_global_height_min_in <- 4.5
ratb_global_height_per_indicator_in <- 0.45
ratb_global_height_padding_in <- 1.2
ratb_global_width_min_in <- 12
ratb_global_width_per_dataset_in <- 3.0

ratb_incidence_height_min_in <- 4.5
ratb_incidence_height_per_indicator_in <- 0.45
ratb_incidence_height_padding_in <- 1.2
ratb_incidence_width_min_in <- 12
ratb_incidence_width_per_dataset_in <- 3.0

ratb_by_type_height_min_in <- 6
ratb_by_type_height_per_indicator_and_type_in <- 0.28
ratb_by_type_height_padding_in <- 1.8
ratb_by_type_width_min_in <- 12
ratb_by_type_width_per_dataset_in <- 3.0
```

```{r}
#| label: ratb_indicator_build
#| echo: false
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_datasets %in% names(dedup_results)))
stopifnot(
  exists("load_ratb_indicator_spec", mode = "function"),
  exists("build_species_taxonomy_map", mode = "function"),
  exists("validate_ratb_indicator_spec", mode = "function"),
  exists("build_ratb_indicator_coverage_audit", mode = "function"),
  exists("build_ratb_indicator_panel_annual", mode = "function"),
  exists("build_ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual", mode = "function")
)

species_taxonomy_path <- file.path(dictionaries_dir, "species_regex_map.csv")
bact_order_map <- build_species_taxonomy_map(species_taxonomy_path)

reference_dataset_name <- names(dedup_results)[[1]]
reference_global_dedup <- dedup_results[[reference_dataset_name]]$global$dedup
reference_by_type_dedup <- dedup_results[[reference_dataset_name]]$by_type$dedup

atb_cols <- intersect(sir_wide_meta$atb_cols, names(reference_global_dedup))
stopifnot(length(atb_cols) > 0L)

supported_atb_cols_meta <- sir_wide_meta$supported_atb_cols
if (is.null(supported_atb_cols_meta)) {
  supported_atb_cols_meta <- sir_wide_meta$filtre_atb
}
if (is.null(supported_atb_cols_meta)) {
  supported_atb_cols_meta <- sir_wide_meta$atb_cols
}
supported_atb_cols <- intersect(
  as.character(supported_atb_cols_meta),
  names(reference_global_dedup)
)
stopifnot(length(supported_atb_cols) > 0L)

available_phenotype_cols <- intersect(
  c("blse_flag", "carbapenemase_flag"),
  names(reference_global_dedup)
)
available_sample_types <- sort(unique(na.omit(as.character(
  reference_by_type_dedup$naturepvt_norm
))))

ratb_indicator_selected_sample_types <- ratb_indicator_sample_types[
  ratb_indicator_sample_types %in% available_sample_types
]
ratb_indicator_missing_sample_types <- setdiff(
  ratb_indicator_sample_types,
  ratb_indicator_selected_sample_types
)
if (length(ratb_indicator_selected_sample_types) == 0L) {
  stop(
    "None of the requested by-type sample types are available. Requested: ",
    paste(ratb_indicator_sample_types, collapse = ", "),
    ". Available: ",
    paste(available_sample_types, collapse = ", "),
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

ratb_indicator_spec <- load_ratb_indicator_spec(ratb_indicator_spec_path)
ratb_indicator_spec_validation <- validate_ratb_indicator_spec(
  spec = ratb_indicator_spec,
  atb_cols = atb_cols,
  supported_atb_cols = supported_atb_cols,
  phenotype_cols = available_phenotype_cols,
  available_sample_types = available_sample_types
)

stopifnot(!any(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$duplicated_indicator_id))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$supported_indicator_kind))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$supported_sample_type_mode))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$supported_numerator_kind))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$supported_denominator_kind))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$has_scope_mode))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$has_filter_values))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$has_valid_indicator_payload))

ratb_indicator_coverage_audit <- build_ratb_indicator_coverage_audit(
  spec = ratb_indicator_spec,
  validation = ratb_indicator_spec_validation
)

ratb_indicator_spec_proportion_exec <- ratb_indicator_spec %>%
  semi_join(
    ratb_indicator_coverage_audit %>%
      filter(proportion_executable) %>%
      select(indicator_id),
    by = "indicator_id"
  )

ratb_indicator_spec_incidence_exec <- ratb_indicator_spec %>%
  semi_join(
    ratb_indicator_coverage_audit %>%
      filter(incidence_executable) %>%
      select(indicator_id),
    by = "indicator_id"
  )

ratb_indicator_panel_annual <- build_ratb_indicator_panel_annual(
  dedup_results = dedup_results,
  spec = ratb_indicator_spec_proportion_exec,
  atb_cols = atb_cols,
  supported_atb_cols = supported_atb_cols,
  bact_order_map = bact_order_map
)

stopifnot(nrow(ratb_indicator_panel_annual) > 0L)
stopifnot(all(
  ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_tested ==
    ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_r + ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_s
))
stopifnot(all(
  ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_isolates ==
    ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_tested + ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_o
))
stopifnot(all(
  is.na(ratb_indicator_panel_annual$pct_resistant) |
    (ratb_indicator_panel_annual$pct_resistant >= 0 &
      ratb_indicator_panel_annual$pct_resistant <= 100)
))

ratb_dataset_levels <- lookup_ratb_dataset_label(
  ratb_indicator_datasets,
  ratb_dataset_display_map
)

ratb_indicator_panel_global <- ratb_indicator_panel_annual %>%
  filter(scope == "global")
ratb_indicator_panel_by_type <- ratb_indicator_panel_annual %>%
  filter(scope == "by_type")
ratb_indicator_panel_by_type_report <- ratb_indicator_panel_by_type %>%
  filter(sample_type %in% ratb_indicator_selected_sample_types)

ratb_indicator_spec_display_source <- ratb_indicator_spec %>%
  mutate(
    signal_label = localize_ratb_indicator_kind(
      indicator_kind,
      indicator_id,
      notes
    ),
    publication_metric_label = localize_ratb_publication_metric(
      publish_proportion,
      publish_incidence
    ),
    publication_view_label = localize_ratb_publication_view(
      sample_type_mode,
      sample_type_values
    ),
    calculation_base_label = localize_ratb_denominator_kind(denominator_kind),
    notes_label = localize_ratb_notes(notes),
    summary_indicator_key = if_else(
      indicator_kind == "phenotype_flag",
      indicator_id,
      NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(display_order)

ratb_indicator_spec_display_summary <- ratb_indicator_spec_display_source %>%
  group_by(
    report_taxon_label,
    signal_label,
    publication_metric_label,
    publication_view_label,
    calculation_base_label,
    summary_indicator_key
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    display_order = min(display_order, na.rm = TRUE),
    organism_label = collapse_ratb_spec_values(organism_label),
    indicators_label = collapse_ratb_spec_values(indicator_label, sep = ", "),
    notes_label = collapse_ratb_spec_values(notes_label),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(display_order, report_taxon_label, signal_label)

ratb_indicator_spec_display <- if (isTRUE(ratb_indicator_show_full_spec)) {
  ratb_indicator_spec_display_summary %>%
    select(
      organism_label,
      report_taxon_label,
      indicators_label,
      signal_label,
      publication_metric_label,
      publication_view_label,
      calculation_base_label,
      notes_label
    ) %>%
    rename(
      `Section micro-organisme` = organism_label,
      `Taxon rapporté` = report_taxon_label,
      `Indicateurs publiés` = indicators_label,
      `Signal utilisé` = signal_label,
      `Métrique publiée` = publication_metric_label,
      `Vue publiée` = publication_view_label,
      `Base de calcul` = calculation_base_label,
      `Notes` = notes_label
    )
} else {
  ratb_indicator_spec_display_summary %>%
    select(
      report_taxon_label,
      indicators_label,
      signal_label,
      publication_metric_label,
      publication_view_label,
      calculation_base_label,
      notes_label
    ) %>%
    rename(
      `Taxon rapporté` = report_taxon_label,
      `Indicateurs publiés` = indicators_label,
      `Signal utilisé` = signal_label,
      `Métrique publiée` = publication_metric_label,
      `Vue publiée` = publication_view_label,
      `Base de calcul` = calculation_base_label,
      `Notes` = notes_label
    )
}
```

```{r}
#| label: ratb_incidence_pipeline_cache
#| echo: false
stopifnot(
  exists("build_ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual", mode = "function"),
  is.list(dedup_results),
  all(ratb_indicator_datasets %in% names(dedup_results)),
  is.data.frame(incidence_denominator_by_year)
)

ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual <- build_ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual(
  dedup_results = dedup_results,
  spec = ratb_indicator_spec_incidence_exec,
  atb_cols = atb_cols,
  supported_atb_cols = supported_atb_cols,
  bact_order_map = bact_order_map,
  incidence_denominator_by_year = incidence_denominator_by_year
)

ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual <- ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual %>%
  filter(!(dedup_year %in% ratb_incidence_excluded_years))

stopifnot(nrow(ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual) > 0L)
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual$scope == "global"))
stopifnot(all(!is.na(ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual$hospital_nights)))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual$hospital_nights > 0))
stopifnot(all(
  ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual$incidence_density_per_1000 >= 0
))
stopifnot(all(
  ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual$n_resistant <=
    ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual$n_isolates
))

ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_global <- ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_annual %>%
  filter(scope == "global")

ratb_incidence_values_report <- ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_global$incidence_density_per_1000
ratb_incidence_values_report <- ratb_incidence_values_report[
  is.finite(ratb_incidence_values_report) & ratb_incidence_values_report >= 0
]
if (length(ratb_incidence_values_report) == 0L) {
  ratb_incidence_fill_limit <- 1
} else if (
  identical(ratb_incidence_fill_limit_mode, "manual") &&
    is.finite(ratb_incidence_fill_limit_manual) &&
    ratb_incidence_fill_limit_manual > 0
) {
  ratb_incidence_fill_limit <- ratb_incidence_fill_limit_manual
} else {
  ratb_incidence_fill_limit <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(
    ratb_incidence_values_report,
    probs = ratb_incidence_fill_limit_quantile,
    na.rm = TRUE,
    names = FALSE,
    type = 7
  ))
}
if (!is.finite(ratb_incidence_fill_limit) || ratb_incidence_fill_limit <= 0) {
  ratb_incidence_fill_limit <- max(ratb_incidence_values_report, na.rm = TRUE)
}
if (!is.finite(ratb_incidence_fill_limit) || ratb_incidence_fill_limit <= 0) {
  ratb_incidence_fill_limit <- 1
}
if (is.null(ratb_fill_breaks_incidence)) {
  ratb_fill_breaks_incidence <- scales::extended_breaks(n = 5)(c(
    0,
    ratb_incidence_fill_limit
  ))
}
```

## Catalogue synthétique des indicateurs publiés

```{r}
#| label: ratb_indicator_spec_table
#| echo: false
show_audit_table(
  data = ratb_indicator_spec_display,
  file_stem = "ratb_indicator_spec",
  caption = "Catalogue synthétique des indicateurs RATB publiés",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "460px"
)
```

Les résultats ci-dessous suivent l'ordre du document métier. Pour chaque taxon, lire d'abord les proportions globales de résistance, puis la densité d'incidence  globale, puis les proportions par type. Les sorties phénotypiques dérivées sont regroupées dans une section dédiée en fin de rapport.  


```{r}
#| label: ratb_report_settings
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_report_settings <- list(
  datatable_digits = 3L,
  indicator_min_n = ratb_indicator_min_n,
  axis_text_x_size = ratb_indicator_axis_text_x_size,
  axis_text_y_size = ratb_indicator_axis_text_y_size,
  strip_text_size = ratb_indicator_strip_text_size,
  label_size_global = ratb_indicator_label_size_global,
  label_size_by_type = ratb_indicator_label_size_by_type,
  label_size_incidence = ratb_indicator_label_size_incidence,
  fill_transform = ratb_fill_transform,
  fill_breaks_proportion = ratb_fill_breaks_proportion,
  fill_palette_proportion = ratb_fill_palette_proportion,
  fill_palette_incidence = ratb_fill_palette_incidence,
  fill_breaks_incidence = ratb_fill_breaks_incidence,
  incidence_fill_limit = ratb_incidence_fill_limit,
  global_height_min_in = ratb_global_height_min_in,
  global_height_per_indicator_in = ratb_global_height_per_indicator_in,
  global_height_padding_in = ratb_global_height_padding_in,
  global_width_min_in = ratb_global_width_min_in,
  global_width_per_dataset_in = ratb_global_width_per_dataset_in,
  incidence_height_min_in = ratb_incidence_height_min_in,
  incidence_height_per_indicator_in = ratb_incidence_height_per_indicator_in,
  incidence_height_padding_in = ratb_incidence_height_padding_in,
  incidence_width_min_in = ratb_incidence_width_min_in,
  incidence_width_per_dataset_in = ratb_incidence_width_per_dataset_in,
  by_type_height_min_in = ratb_by_type_height_min_in,
  by_type_height_per_indicator_and_type_in = ratb_by_type_height_per_indicator_and_type_in,
  by_type_height_padding_in = ratb_by_type_height_padding_in,
  by_type_width_min_in = ratb_by_type_width_min_in,
  by_type_width_per_dataset_in = ratb_by_type_width_per_dataset_in
)
```

```{r}
#| label: ratb_report_context
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_report_context <- build_ratb_report_context(
  panel_global = ratb_indicator_panel_global,
  panel_incidence_global = ratb_indicator_panel_incidence_global,
  panel_by_type_report = ratb_indicator_panel_by_type_report,
  indicator_spec = ratb_indicator_spec,
  dataset_display_map = ratb_dataset_display_map,
  dataset_levels = ratb_dataset_levels,
  selected_sample_types = ratb_indicator_selected_sample_types,
  report_settings = ratb_report_settings
)
```


## Staphylococcus aureus

```{r}
#| label: ratb_staphylococcus_aureus_outputs
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs <- build_ratb_taxon_outputs(
  "Staphylococcus aureus",
  ratb_report_context
)
```

#### Global

```{r}
#| label: ratb_staphylococcus_aureus_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$pdf_button
```

#### Incidence

```{r}
#| label: ratb_staphylococcus_aureus_incidence_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$pdf_button
```

#### Par type

```{r}
#| label: ratb_staphylococcus_aureus_by_type_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$pdf_button
```

## Enterobacterales

Cette section regroupe la sortie Enterobacterales agrégée et les sorties spécifiques aux espèces demandées dans le document métier.

### Enterobacterales agrégés

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterobacterales_pooled_outputs
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs <- build_ratb_taxon_outputs(
  "Enterobacterales",
  ratb_report_context
)
```

#### Global

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterobacterales_pooled_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$pdf_button
```

#### Incidence

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterobacterales_pooled_incidence_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$pdf_button
```

#### Par type

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterobacterales_pooled_by_type_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$pdf_button
```

### Escherichia coli

```{r}
#| label: ratb_escherichia_coli_outputs
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs <- build_ratb_taxon_outputs(
  "Escherichia coli",
  ratb_report_context
)
```

#### Global

```{r}
#| label: ratb_escherichia_coli_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$pdf_button
```

#### Incidence

```{r}
#| label: ratb_escherichia_coli_incidence_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$pdf_button
```

#### Par type

```{r}
#| label: ratb_escherichia_coli_by_type_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$pdf_button
```

### Klebsiella pneumoniae

```{r}
#| label: ratb_klebsiella_pneumoniae_outputs
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs <- build_ratb_taxon_outputs(
  "Klebsiella pneumoniae",
  ratb_report_context
)
```

#### Global

```{r}
#| label: ratb_klebsiella_pneumoniae_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$pdf_button
```

#### Incidence

```{r}
#| label: ratb_klebsiella_pneumoniae_incidence_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$pdf_button
```

#### Par type

```{r}
#| label: ratb_klebsiella_pneumoniae_by_type_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$pdf_button
```

### Enterobacter cloacae complex

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterobacter_cloacae_complex_outputs
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs <- build_ratb_taxon_outputs(
  "Enterobacter cloacae complex",
  ratb_report_context
)
```

#### Global

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterobacter_cloacae_complex_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$pdf_button
```

#### Incidence

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterobacter_cloacae_complex_incidence_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$pdf_button
```

#### Par type

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterobacter_cloacae_complex_by_type_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$pdf_button
```

### Autres Enterobacterales

```{r}
#| label: ratb_autres_enterobacterales_outputs
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs <- build_ratb_taxon_outputs(
  "Autres Enterobacterales",
  ratb_report_context
)
```

#### Global

```{r}
#| label: ratb_autres_enterobacterales_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$pdf_button
```

#### Incidence

```{r}
#| label: ratb_autres_enterobacterales_incidence_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$pdf_button
```

#### Par type

```{r}
#| label: ratb_autres_enterobacterales_by_type_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$pdf_button
```

## Enterococcus faecium

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterococcus_faecium_outputs
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs <- build_ratb_taxon_outputs(
  "Enterococcus faecium",
  ratb_report_context
)
```

#### Global

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterococcus_faecium_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$pdf_button
```

#### Incidence

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterococcus_faecium_incidence_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$pdf_button
```

#### Par type

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterococcus_faecium_by_type_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$pdf_button
```

## Enterococcus faecalis

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterococcus_faecalis_outputs
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs <- build_ratb_taxon_outputs(
  "Enterococcus faecalis",
  ratb_report_context
)
```

#### Global

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterococcus_faecalis_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$pdf_button
```

#### Incidence

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterococcus_faecalis_incidence_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$pdf_button
```

#### Par type

```{r}
#| label: ratb_enterococcus_faecalis_by_type_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$pdf_button
```

## Acinetobacter baumannii

```{r}
#| label: ratb_acinetobacter_baumannii_outputs
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs <- build_ratb_taxon_outputs(
  "Acinetobacter baumannii",
  ratb_report_context
)
```

#### Global

```{r}
#| label: ratb_acinetobacter_baumannii_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$pdf_button
```

#### Incidence

```{r}
#| label: ratb_acinetobacter_baumannii_incidence_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$pdf_button
```

#### Par type

```{r}
#| label: ratb_acinetobacter_baumannii_by_type_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$pdf_button
```

## Pseudomonas aeruginosa

```{r}
#| label: ratb_pseudomonas_aeruginosa_outputs
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs <- build_ratb_taxon_outputs(
  "Pseudomonas aeruginosa",
  ratb_report_context
)
```

#### Global

```{r}
#| label: ratb_pseudomonas_aeruginosa_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$global$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$global$pdf_button
```

#### Incidence

```{r}
#| label: ratb_pseudomonas_aeruginosa_incidence_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$incidence$pdf_button
```

#### Par type

```{r}
#| label: ratb_pseudomonas_aeruginosa_by_type_display
#| echo: false
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$table
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_heading
prepare_plot_for_print(
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_width,
  ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$plot_height
)
ratb_taxon_outputs$by_type$pdf_button
```

## Phénotypes dérivés

Cette section regroupe les sorties phénotypiques dérivées. Elles sont présentées sous forme de tableaux pour garder visibles les numérateurs et les dénominateurs. Pour les proportions, le dénominateur est l'ensemble des isolats du périmètre concerné et les non positifs regroupent toutes les souches sans phénotype positif. Pour l'incidence, le numérateur reste le nombre de souches positives et le dénominateur le nombre de nuits d'hospitalisation éligibles.

```{r}
#| label: ratb_phenotype_output_sets
#| include: false
#| echo: false
ratb_phenotype_output_sets <- list(
  kpneumo = list(
    proportion_global = build_ratb_phenotype_proportion_table_block(
      indicator_ids = c(
        "kpneumo_blse_prop_global",
        "kpneumo_carbapenemase_prop_global"
      ),
      file_stem = "ratb_phenotype_kpneumo_prop_global",
      caption = "Klebsiella pneumoniae - tableau annuel des proportions phénotypiques (vue globale)",
      context = ratb_report_context
    ),
    incidence_global = build_ratb_phenotype_incidence_table_block(
      indicator_ids = c(
        "kpneumo_blse_inc_global",
        "kpneumo_carbapenemase_inc_global"
      ),
      file_stem = "ratb_phenotype_kpneumo_inc_global",
      caption = "Klebsiella pneumoniae - tableau annuel des densités d'incidence phénotypiques (vue globale)",
      context = ratb_report_context
    ),
    proportion_hemo = build_ratb_phenotype_proportion_table_block(
      indicator_ids = c("kpneumo_carbapenemase_prop_hemo"),
      file_stem = "ratb_phenotype_kpneumo_prop_hemo",
      caption = "Klebsiella pneumoniae - tableau annuel de la sortie phénotypique de compatibilité sur hemoculture",
      sample_type_filter = "hemoculture",
      context = ratb_report_context
    )
  ),
  enterobacterales = list(
    proportion_global = build_ratb_phenotype_proportion_table_block(
      indicator_ids = c(
        "enterobacterales_blse_prop_global",
        "enterobacterales_carbapenemase_prop_global"
      ),
      file_stem = "ratb_phenotype_enterobacterales_prop_global",
      caption = "Enterobacterales - tableau annuel des proportions phénotypiques (vue globale)",
      context = ratb_report_context
    ),
    incidence_global = build_ratb_phenotype_incidence_table_block(
      indicator_ids = c(
        "enterobacterales_blse_inc_global",
        "enterobacterales_carbapenemase_inc_global"
      ),
      file_stem = "ratb_phenotype_enterobacterales_inc_global",
      caption = "Enterobacterales - tableau annuel des densités d'incidence phénotypiques (vue globale)",
      context = ratb_report_context
    )
  )
)
```

### Klebsiella pneumoniae

#### Proportions globales

```{r}
#| label: ratb_phenotype_kpneumo_prop_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_phenotype_output_sets$kpneumo$proportion_global
```

#### Densités d'incidence globales

```{r}
#| label: ratb_phenotype_kpneumo_incidence_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_phenotype_output_sets$kpneumo$incidence_global
```

#### Sortie additionnelle de compatibilité : hemoculture

```{r}
#| label: ratb_phenotype_kpneumo_prop_hemo_display
#| echo: false
ratb_phenotype_output_sets$kpneumo$proportion_hemo
```

### Enterobacterales

#### Proportions globales

```{r}
#| label: ratb_phenotype_enterobacterales_prop_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_phenotype_output_sets$enterobacterales$proportion_global
```

#### Densités d'incidence globales

```{r}
#| label: ratb_phenotype_enterobacterales_incidence_global_display
#| echo: false
ratb_phenotype_output_sets$enterobacterales$incidence_global
```
